Caroline Dinenage MP

A strong voice for Gosport, Stubbington, Lee on the Solent & Hill Head

It's an honour to be the Conservative MP for Gosport, Lee on the Solent, Stubbington and Hill Head. Here you can find my latest news, my campaigns on local and national issues, and useful links to local information. You'll also find ways to contact me.

I hope you find my site helpful.
